name: AI-powered stock market summary bot
description: Searches for the latest market news via Exa, Claude AI summarizes market movements, key events, and sector performance, then posts a formatted daily market summary to Slack with Block Kit formatting. Adapted from n8n's AI-powered stock market summary bot workflow.

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for market news search

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting the market summary

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the market summary

marketFocus.description: Market focus area (e.g., 'US stock market', 'crypto', 'global markets')

sectors.description: Comma-separated list of sectors to track

steps.name: Search Exa for latest market news

code.source:
const topic = $.input.topic || $.input.companyName || $.input.marketFocus || "market analysis";
return { query: topic + " stock market analysis trends" };

steps.name: Search Exa for sector-specific market news
Build Claude prompt for market summary
Build Slack Block Kit market summary
